name: movinet_mobilevit_classifier_head

work_request.coder_goal: Implement the requested feature from scratch.

baseline_run.reason: default baseline run for overseer-side evaluation

baseline_toml.reason: current SOTA config and default base config; it must remain untouched

feature_brief.exact_feature: Replace the current shallow MoViNet classifier with a lightweight MobileViT-style hybrid classifier head. The new head should operate on the final MoViNet feature map before global pooling, reduce it to a manageable token set, apply a small amount of self-attention, then pool and emit the existing binary logits.

primary_paper.title: MobileViT: Light-weight, General-purpose, and Mobile-friendly Vision Transformer

constraints: Do not modify or replace the pretrained MoViNet backbone.
Only change the classification head behavior.
Keep the task as binary violence classification.
Keep the head lightweight and practical for the existing A5 training setup.

implementation_rules: Keep the current SOTA TOML as the default base config unless explicitly changed by the overseer.
Any new feature must be optional and switchable on or off through config.
Introduce a new TOML that enables the requested feature, and leave 3866-hail.toml untouched.
